name: Banana Nut Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs and margarine; press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
2. Combine cream cheese, sugar, and banana in a bowl. Mix until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Stir in walnuts, then pour over the crust.
3. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 40 minutes. Loosen cake from the rim before cooling completely.
4. Melt chocolate pieces and margarine with water over low heat, stirring until smooth. Drizzle over cheesecake. Chill.
